name_en: Reproduction Miu Miu brown 5BB142, Miu's new bowling bag, officially promoted, this year's absolute hit🔥 style. Top-grade imported calfskin, Miu's unique Matelasse pattern. Exquisite, three-dimensional, and structured bag body. Front engraved logo echoes the leather color. Removable and adjustable leather long shoulder strap. Cotton satin lining, with zippered pocket. Many celebrities and influencers have the same style. Size: 22X10.5X7.5Cm, with original packaging
